name: Kangxin New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Kangxin New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the afforestation, processing, design, and production of construction structural lumber products in China. Its principal products include poplar wood products, mountain forest woods, and COSB oriented structural boards, as well as series of solid wood composite boards for container floors, EP decorative boards, construction plywood, etc.; and poplar and urban landscape seedlings. The company also produces wooden houses. Kangxin New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Xiaogan, China.
